subject: WM-0052 review: changes_requested
body: High: health condition mutations are not atomic on dirty queue overflow; failed add/update/age/remove can leave owner state, versions, actor links, counts, and partial invalidations. Medium: invalid ability thresholds return below-threshold instead of value_out_of_range, cache hits report cache_stale_basis, and terminalState accepts out-of-range values via Uint8Array wrap.
